# Source: The Elimination Diet

> Reference book for the upcoming dairy-elimination experiment.

## Capture

Six-week protocol: weeks 1-3 remove the top eight allergens; weeks 4-6 reintroduce one at a time, 72 hours each, log symptoms. The strict phase is non-negotiable — partial elimination prevents the immune system from clearing the inflammatory load.
